query: SELECT id, store_code, report_type, report_date, submitter_name, status, total_score, created_at, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.submitterName') as data_submitter FROM report_submissions WHERE store_code LIKE '%ackay%' AND report_type LIKE '%anager%' AND report_date = '2026-03-03' ORDER BY created_at DESC;
